subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, transcending the comprehension of both first and last, befitteth the Lord of the Day of Judgment, Who through His Most Exalted Word [3.5s]... ...Glory be unto Thee, O Thou Who art the Creator of the Point, Who art the Ordainer, the Adorner, the Protector and Champion whereof!
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ادراک اولین و آخرین مالک یوم الدین را لایق و سزاست که بکلمه علیا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @four pillars, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
